name: dam_forward_traverse
description: Archetype traversal parity route: outdoor pure-movement on the Dam (mission 1), the complement of the combat route dam_combat_guard6. Bond walks forward and strafes for ~30s. gate:true; the durable ares-free gate is the pre-existing, self-contained, tape_regression-proven baselines/tapes/dam_forward_30s.ge7tape (byte-exact replay, gate_routes_smoke.sh). Sixth gate:true route: chosen on a reliably race-free early mission after heavier levels (silo/archives/depot/egypt/aztec) were found to have an intermittent boot-load tick-alignment race (filed finding). NOTE: the paired ares stock capture does NOT exist yet (FID-0076: needs per-mission menu-nav choreography + unlocked EEPROM); until it lands, this route gates determinism only, and sense_trace_sweep --gate skips its stock comparison loudly. Capture recipe when unblocked: movement_oracle_capture.sh --route dam_forward_traverse --native-full-trace, then compare_combat_trace.py --align tick.
